name: @canopy/circles
description: Audience model + saved-audience (circles) substrate. One package because circles are saved audiences — same primitive at two granularities. Ships `Audience` typedef, `normalizeAudience`, `resolveAudience`, `inAudience`, and `createCirclesStore({itemStore})` over the canonical `circle` item type. SP-5 V0 — see CODING-uniforme-representatie.md. NOTE: circle.id and task.crewId share the same string identifier space (see CIRCLE_ID_IS_CREW_ID_ALIAS in @canopy/item-types).
